title: OpenTSI Dataset Metadata
description: Schema for OpenTSI time series dataset metadata. Keys follow the pattern: country.provider.dataset.dimension.variable.unit

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the data provider

provider.description: Short identifier for the data provider

title.description: Dataset title in one or more languages

source_url.description: URL to the original data source

dataset_frequency.description: Observation frequency: D=daily, W=weekly, M=monthly, Q=quarterly, Y=yearly, I=irregular

units.description: Units of measurement. Use 'all' for uniform units, or specify per variable key

aggregate.description: Aggregation method for temporal aggregation. Use 'all' for uniform method, or specify per variable key

dim_order.description: Order of dimensions in the key (left to right, after country.provider.dataset)

hierarchy.description: Hierarchical structure of dimensions and their values

labels.description: Human-readable labels for dimensions and values

update_checksum.description: MD5 checksum of source data state, used to detect updates (auto-generated by pipeline)

multilingualText.description: Text in one or more languages. English (en) is required as baseline.
